templates.name: Can I return a final sale item?
templates.content: We appreciate you reaching out. Unfortunately, all discounted items are final sale and not eligible for refunds. We're sorry for the inconvenience this may cause. Please let us know if you have any questions!

templates.name: Where do you ship from
templates.content: All our packages ship from our warehouse located in Southern California.

templates.name: Where's your makeup line?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we have discontinued our makeup line. We appreciate your love for this product and will be sure to forward your message to our global product development team!

templates.name: Medical condition inquiries
templates.content: Unfortunately, we're unable to advise on medical concerns. We always recommend consulting with a physician should you have any health concerns.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/innisfreeusa/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/innisfreeusa/

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://innisfree.attn.tv/sl/pjXbrR7C

templates.name: Are your products non comedogenic?
templates.content: We put our products through a variety of vigorous tests ranging from dermatologists to non-comedogenic tests. However, the types of tests each product goes through vary depending on the benefits and goals of each formulation. Please reach out to us at innisfree@apus.amorepacific.com with the particular product you are interested in, and we will be happy to assist you with further details.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out our latest offers here: https://us.innisfree.com/pages/offers

templates.name: Are your products organic?
templates.content: All of our ingredients are responsibly sourced from Korea and meet the Korean organic standard, however, for the US market, we don't currently have the USDA Organic seal. All of our ingredients are plant-derived. We're currently working with the USDA for the organic seal, but this process hasn't yet been completed.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at  innisfree@apus.amorepacific.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes/APO/FPO addresses?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we do not ship to private mailboxes (PMB), PO Boxes, and APO/FPO addresses. Apologies for the inconvenience!

templates.name: Do my points expire?
templates.content: Yes, they can expire! Points will expire due to account inactivity for a period of one year.

templates.name: Does my tier ever expire?
templates.content: Your current tier is calculated based on your total spend within the last 12-month period. If you go down a tier, you will still retain your previously earned points, except in the case of account inactivity in any 12-month period.

templates.name: Can I return or exchange my sheet mask club order?
templates.content: I'm afraid there are no returns, exchanges, or refunds given on subscriptions unless they are damaged or defective upon arrival. All Sheet Mask Club orders are final and refunds are not given for "incorrect choices", "change of mind" purchases, or "exchanges". I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: How do I manage my subscription?
templates.content: It's easy to edit your subscription! You can manage or make changes to your subscriptions at any time, by logging into your account, clicking "Manage Subscriptions" and following the prompts (e.g., view the status of your subscriptions, add or reactivate a subscription). Any changes you make will be reflected in your next shipment, except for changes initiated while an order is in process in which case they will be reflected after the current order has been completed.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Once the returned products arrive at our distribution center, we will inspect the products and process the refund within 15 business days. Refunds are credited to the original form of payment used when the order was placed on us.innisfree.com.

templates.name: Are your products fragrance free?
templates.content: Some of our products are formulated without fragrance, and others are infused with botanical and herbal ingredients that contain naturally derived fragrances. We also may add fragrance during manufacturing processes for some products to capture the essence of the harmony and balance of the formula. Our goal is to provide skincare with the best benefits while delivering a luxurious sensorial experience that help pamper the senses and create a relaxing ritual bringing harmony and balance.

templates.name: Can your products be used for sensitive skin?
templates.content: If you have known sensitivity to certain ingredients, please carefully review the ingredient list before purchasing the product. We also recommend you speak with your healthcare provider before purchasing. Before using any products for the first time, we always recommend that you perform a patch test on your forearm in case of any skin sensitivities.

templates.name: Can I use your products if I have a skin condition/rosacea/cystic acne/dermatitis etc.?
templates.content: We recommend you consult your primary care physician or dermatologist in regard to your particular skin condition before making any changes to your daily routine.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not offer international shipping at the moment.

templates.name: What happens to my points if my order is returned or canceled?
templates.content: Any points associated with the order will be deducted from your account balance.

templates.name: Do your products contain Parabens, Phthalates, Formaldehyde etc.?
templates.content: Every Innisfree product is formulated without Parabens, Phthalates, Formaldehyde, Triclosan, Butylated Hydroxyanisole, and Methylisothiazolinone.

templates.name: What happened to the Intensive Hydrating Cream with Green Tea Seed?
templates.content: The Intensive Hydrating Cream with Green Tea Seed has been reformulated and rebranded to the Green Tea Seed Hyaluronic Acid Cream. We introduced Hyaluronic acid to the product and slightly tweaked the formula to compensate.

templates.name: Are your products cruelty free?
templates.content: Amorepacific Corporation, the parent company of the Innisfree brand, strictly prohibits animal testing having begun its commitment to alternative testing methods over 30 years ago. We ourselves do not test on animals nor do we ask others to conduct animal testing for us. If obligated by law or regulatory bodies for reasons of safety, however, limited exceptions may apply. Our consumers' safety and peaceful coexistence between nature, people, and business is priority and Amorepacific remains committed to providing quality products worldwide.

templates.name: Do you use MethylIsothiazolinone / Methylchloroisothiazolinone (MIT / CMIT)?
templates.content: The use of MIT and CMIT in our products is strictly prohibited. Since their invention in the 1960s, MIT and CMIT have been widely used as preservatives in toothpastes, shampoos, body washes, and sterilizing items. In Korea, they were designated as toxic substances in 2012 by Chemicals Control Act, and still available to use only 0.0015 % in wash-off cosmetics and some quasi-drugs.

templates.name: Do you use preservatives?
templates.content: Preservatives are used in cosmetics, foods, household products, and medicines to inhibit or decrease microbial growth, prevent decay or deterioration of products while they are being stored and used. At Innisfree, we choose preservative ingredients with standards that are higher than the requirements of global regulatory bodies and formulate with only the minimal and effective concentrations backed by research to maximize product safety and quality.

templates.name: Do you use animal-derived Ingredients?
templates.content: We use only regenerative by-products derived from insects or marine organisms, such as honey extract, fish-derived collagen, natural pearls material & carmine.

templates.name: Do you use Microplastic (Microbeads)?
templates.content: The use of microplastics in our products is strictly prohibited. Microplastics (Microbeads) are defined as solid polymer particles having a particle size of a few milimeters or less that are used to exfoliate, polish or clean. These microbreads also have negative impacts on our beloved aquatic ecosystem. Microplastics used in wash-off type cosmetics have been banned in US (2017), Korea (2017), Canada (2018), China (2020).

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you: https://innisfree.attn.tv/sl/uEfdw0no

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://us.innisfree.com/pages/rewards

templates.name: How do I redeem my birthday code?
templates.content: To redeem your Birthday Code, log in to your account and enter your Birthday Code at checkout. You will be sent your Birthday Code on the day of your birthday. Birthday Codes are only eligible for inni-Friend Rewards members. Please note, the Birthday Code can't be combined with other coupon codes, or discounts including points.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: How can I change my membership information?
templates.content: After you sign-in, you can change your information on the "My Account" page by clicking the "edit" button.

templates.name: When is my birthday code added to my account?
templates.content: Your birthday code will be sent to your account's associated email address on the date of your birthday.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on orders over $40 within the contiguous United States. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: How do I redeem my points?
templates.content: Please follow these easy steps from the secure checkout when you're logged in with the email address attributed to your Rewards Account: 1. Enter the number of points you would like to redeem in the "Rewards Points" field. On desktop, this can be found on the right-hand side bar and on mobile it's located under "Order Summary". 2. Click "Apply" on desktop, or the green arrow next to the rewards field on mobile. 3. Look for the discount in the order summary below and place your order. Please note, purchases can't be paid entirely by points at this time.

templates.name: What is the difference between Intensive Hydrating Toner and Balance Toner
templates.content: Both of them have distinct ingredients and do not have the same formulation. The main benefit of the quick-absorbing Balancing Gel is to help balance skin whereas the Intensive Hydrating Toner is packed with antioxidants and amino acids from a balanced blend of green tea and green tea seed oil to help prep skin for the rest of your skincare routine while supporting its natural moisture barrier. Hope this helps! :)

templates.name: How do I change my sheet mask flavor?
templates.content: Your Sheet Mask Club flavor selections can be changed with every renewal. Just log in to your account and click 'Manage Subscriptions' to edit your subscription. Please note that My Real Squeeze Mask flavors are subject to stock availability.

templates.name: What is the sheet mask club?
templates.content: Our sheet mask club subscription will restock your sheet mask stash and auto-replenish your order every 30, 60, or 90 days depending on your subscription period.  You can cancel at any time prior to the renewal date.

templates.name: Are your products safe for those pregnant or breastfeeding?
templates.content: We recommend you consult your physician before making any changes to your daily routine.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.narvar.com/innisfree/returns

templates.name: Are your products oil-free?
templates.content: We incorporate a variety of different kinds of naturally derived oils and other oil-based ingredients for their nourishing benefits in many of our products. Please let me know if you have specific concerns or questions about the oil content of a product, and I'll be happy to assist you with further details on the particular product.

templates.name: Can you retroactively apply the code to my order?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are unable to apply codes retroactively. We're sorry for the inconvenience this may cause. Please let us know if you have any questions.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Please allow 3-5 business days for order processing. You can see the estimated delivery time based on your location at the following link: https://innisfree.attn.tv/sl/Ha1pdPul

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at  innisfree@apus.amorepacific.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: We're happy to help answer any questions about our products! For any questions about your order, please contact our customer service team at: innisfree@apus.amorepacific.com. Due to a high volume of inquiries, our team will get back to you within 72 hours.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: For any questions about your order, please contact our customer service team at innisfree@apus.amorepacific.com. Due to a high volume of inquiries, our team will get back to you within 72 hours.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://us.innisfree.com/pages/offers

templates.name: Payment options
templates.content: We accept American Express, Visa, Mastercard, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay and Afterpay.
